title: NTILE window function returns incorrect results
poc: create table employees (dep varchar(10), name varchar(20), salary double, hire_date date);
SELECT dep, name, salary, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) FROM employees;
key_bug_features: NTILE window function with incorrect ordering of hire_date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE employees (dep varchar(10) NOT NULL, name varchar(20) NOT NULL, salary double CHECK (salary > 0), hire_date date DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO employees (dep, name, salary, hire_date) VALUES ('mgmt', 'Smith', 81, str_to_date('10-08-2019', '%d-%m-%Y'));
INSERT INTO employees (dep, name, salary, hire_date) VALUES ('dev', 'Jones', 55, str_to_date('9-08-2019', '%d-%m-%Y'));
SELECT dep, name, salary, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date DESC) FROM employees;
SELECT dep, name, salary, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) FROM employees WHERE salary IS NOT NULL;
